description_long: This is a large, freestanding kitchen or utility cabinet with a woodgrain finish and a black countertop. The upper section features three open shelves containing several bottles and mugs, while the lower section includes a sink with a faucet, drawers, and additional open shelving. The backsplash is made of white brick tiles, heavily stained with red splatters, suggesting a distressed or horror-themed environment. The countertop and sink area are also marked with red stains, and various containers and mugs are scattered across the surfaces. The cabinet's design is modern, with clean lines and a mix of open and closed storage spaces. The overall appearance is functional but visually striking due to the dramatic stains and cluttered contents.
description: A large, woodgrain cabinet with open shelves, a stained countertop and backsplash, and various bottles and mugs scattered throughout. The design is modern and functional, but the red stains give it a distressed, horror-themed look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the woodgrain finish, angled upper section, and a glimpse of the black countertop with a mug.
description_view_1: Front view displaying open shelves with bottles and mugs, a stained white brick backsplash, a sink, and multiple drawers and compartments.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the faucet, sink, and countertop with visible red stains.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the cabinet, closed panels, and the stained brick backsplash.
